final:
module dff_4bit(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] d,
    output reg [3:0] q);
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
